problem id: f1a05733
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) XOR NOT SHL(3)) OR SHR(1)

examples:
  01111100 -> 11111110
  11000000 -> 11111100
  01110101 -> 10111010
  11011001 -> 01111100
  11001111 -> 11111111
  11011110 -> 01111111
  00011010 -> 01001111
  11101000 -> 01111100

query: 10100010
predicted answer: 01110101
